name: Vietnamese Pork Burgers
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp Peanut or other mild vegetable oil
1-2 drops Tabasco sauce or 1 pinch cayenne pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the lean ground pork with garlic, onions, soy sauce, peanut oil (or other mild vegetable oil), sugar, Tabasco sauce or cayenne pepper.
2. Form the mixture into patties and grill until cooked through.
3. Serve each grilled patty spread with hoisin sauce, wrapped in a leaf of lettuce, sprinkled with peanuts and cilantro.
4. Accompany with bland steamed rice or French bread to balance the flavors.
Makes 4 servings.
PER SERVING: 310 calories, 27 g protein, 5 g carbohydrate, 20 g fat (5 g saturated), 76 mg cholesterol, 263 mg sodium, 2 g fiber.
